# Vedryx

Vedryx helps product and HR teams skip resume screening, calls, and interview scheduling by evaluating pre-vetted developers through real work.

## Core Offering

- India-based vetted remote developers for global product teams
- Full-time dedicated developers who work inside client tools, meetings, and delivery workflows
- React, Node.js, Python, Java Spring Boot, DevOps, cloud, data, QA automation, frontend, backend, and full-stack developers
- 72-hour replacement SLA: from a client's written notice of dissatisfaction, Vedryx delivers a vetted replacement shortlist within 72 hours
- Developer replacement at no extra cost during the agreed guarantee period if performance misses expectations
- Developers remain employed by Vedryx during evaluation, so clients avoid PIP and severance liability
- Offline commercial contract between Vedryx and the client company
- Service areas include the United States, United Kingdom, Europe, Australia, Middle East, and India

## Primary Pages

- Home: https://vedryxtech.com/

## FAQ

The homepage carries a FAQ covering the unlimited replacement guarantee, how Vedryx vets developers (multi-round interviews → full-time Vedryx employment → in-house product work before client placement), engagement length (flexible and contract-defined), IP ownership (full assignment to the client on creation), and how Vedryx Hire differs from marketplaces like Toptal, Andela, and Turing (dedicated not marketplace, unlimited replacement at no extra cost, single Vedryx-to-client contract keeping PIP and severance liability off the client's books).
